'''lapojo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:fibrolite|fibrolite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-p-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fibrolite|fibrolite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| lapojo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || læpejeth || læpejej || læpejesh || læpeje
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || lapopojoth || lapopojoj || lapopojosh || lapopojo
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || lapojoth || lapojoj || lapojosh || lapojo
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || lapofjofth || lapofjofj || lapofjofsh || lapofjof
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || lapojotho || lapojojo || lapojosho || lapojoko
|-
| [[Patient]] || lapojoth || lapojoj || lapojosh || lapojo
|-
| [[Possessive]] || lapojothol || lapojojol || lapojoshol || lapojokol
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || lapojoothotho || lapojoojojo || lapojooshosho || lapojooko
|-
| [[Dative]] || lapojothon || lapojojon || lapojoshon || lapojokon
|-
| [[Speaker]] || lapojothooro || lapojojooro || lapojoshooro || lapojokooro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
